name: shop-weaponsmith
summary: A weaponsmith's retail front (as opposed to the full smithy). Racks of finished blades, polearms along the walls, display cases of daggers, a counter with a ledger. Smithy is implied behind a back door.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangle with walls lined in weapon racks

accent.purpose: testing zone — a small striking stand

primary_palette.note: testing floor shop — range target for buyers to try bows

story_prompts: guard resupply — a sergeant ordering twenty spears, owner haggling
adventurer fitting — a newcomer testing sword heft, owner advising
mourning order — a widow commissioning her husband's blade for a son
night deal — shop closed, back door open, a crate of unmarked weapons changing hands

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: bright shop light (0.5) — polished steel must gleam

anti_patterns: weapons hang from walls, never stacked on the floor — this is retail
counter near the door so the owner sees everyone entering
don't mix with active smithy — the forge is behind a door, not in this room
